allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $pid_to_kill = $_.OwningProcess; Write-Host "Killing PID $pid_to_kill"; Stop-Process -Id $pid_to_kill -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Still alive: $\($_.OwningProcess\)" }; "----"; $p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8765' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\muham\\Desktop\\Vortway Logo' -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; "Started PID $\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8765/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "ROOT 200 — first 400 chars:`n$\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "ROOT err: $_" })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\muham\\Desktop\\Vortway Logo\\website\\app.js" -Raw; try { node --check "c:\\Users\\muham\\Desktop\\Vortway Logo\\website\\app.js" 2>&1 | Out-String; "JS_SYNTAX_OK" } catch { "JS_SYNTAX_FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($pid_to_kill = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid_to_kill\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid_to_kill -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Stopped python server PID $pid_to_kill" } else { "No server running" })

PowerShell($existing = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($existing\) { foreach \($p in $existing\) { if \($p -gt 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8765" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\muham\\Desktop\\Vortway Logo\\website" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/index.html" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; "Server up on http://localhost:8765 \(HTTP $r\)" } catch { "Server start failed: $_" })

PowerShell($existing = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($existing\) { foreach \($p in $existing\) { if \($p -gt 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8765" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\muham\\Desktop\\Vortway Logo\\website" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $a = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/index.html" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; $b = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/style.css" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; $c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/app.js" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; "index:$a style:$b app:$c")
